words.definition: the way you think or feel about something

words.definition: enough for what is needed

words.definition: at last; after a long time

words.definition: the joint where your arm meets your body

words.definition: a prediction about future weather

words.definition: to go forward or continue

words.definition: to get involved in something that isn't your business
